briefdescription.para: Global System for Mobile communications (2G, 3GPP Rel 99)
Bandwidth & Spectrum limited variant of GSM (2G, 3GPP Rel 99)
UMTS Terrestrial Radio Access Network (3G, 3GPP Rel 99)
GSM Enhanced General Packet Radio Service (2.5G, 3GPP Rel 99)
UTRAN with High Speed Downlink Packet Access (3.5G, 3GPP Rel 5)
UTRAN with High Speed Uplink Packet Access (3.75G, 3GPP Rel 6)
UTRAN with HSDPA and HSUDP (HSPA) (3.75G, 3GPP Rel 6)
Extended Coverage GSM for IoT (2G, 3GPP Rel 13)
LTE/E-UTRA connected to 5G Core Network (5G, 3GPP Rel 15)
New Radio with 5G Core Network (5G, 3GPP Rel 15)
Next Generation RAN over Satellite (5G, 3GPP Rel 17)
Not registered, searching for an operator.
Attached for emergency bearer services only.
Registered for "CSFB not preferred", home network.
Registered for "CSFB not preferred", roaming network.
Attached for access to "Restricted Local Operator Services".
One or more modem-info field changed (e.g.
Result of a communications link check to the modem.
Events emitted asynchronously by a cellular driver.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* cellular_event_cb_t) (const struct device *dev, enum cellular_event event, const void *payload, void *user_data)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, enum cellular_event event, const void *payload, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: cellular_event_cb_t

parameterdescription.para: Cellular device that generated the event
Which cellular_event occurred
Pointer to the kind-specific payload (NULL if the kind defines no payload).
Pointer supplied when the callback was registered

simplesect.para: The driver calls the callback directly from its own context. Off-load heavy processing to a work-queue if required.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cellular_api_configure_networks) (const struct device *dev, const struct cellular_network *networks, uint8_t size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct cellular_network *networks, uint8_t size)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_configure_networks

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct cellular_network **networks, uint8_t *size)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_get_supported_networks

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cellular_api_get_signal) (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_signal_type type, int16_t *value)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_signal_type type, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_get_signal

briefdescription.para: API for getting network signal strength.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cellular_api_get_modem_info) (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_modem_info_type type, char *info, size_t size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_modem_info_type type, char *info, size_t size)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_get_modem_info

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cellular_api_get_registration_status) (const struct device *dev, enum cellular_access_technology tech, enum cellular_registration_status *status)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, enum cellular_access_technology tech, enum cellular_registration_status *status)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_get_registration_status

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cellular_api_set_apn) (const struct device *dev, const char *apn)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_set_apn

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* cellular_api_set_callback) (const struct device *dev, cellular_event_mask_t mask, cellular_event_cb_t cb, void *user_data)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, cellular_event_mask_t mask, cellular_event_cb_t cb, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: cellular_api_set_callback

briefdescription.para: API for registering an asynchronous callback.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct cellular_network *networks, uint8_t size)
memberdef.name: cellular_configure_networks

briefdescription.para: Configure cellular networks for the device.

detaileddescription.para: Cellular network devices support at least one cellular access technology. Each cellular access technology defines a set of bands, of which the cellular device will support all or a subset of.

The cellular device can only use one cellular network technology at a time. It must exclusively use the cellular network configurations provided, and will prioritize the cellular network configurations in the order they are provided in case there are multiple (the first cellular network configuration has the highest priority).

parameterdescription.para: Cellular network device instance.
List of cellular network configurations to apply.
Size of list of cellular network configurations.
if successful.
if any provided cellular network configuration is invalid or unsupported.
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
Negative errno-code otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct cellular_network **networks, uint8_t *size)
memberdef.name: cellular_get_supported_networks

briefdescription.para: Get supported cellular networks for the device.

parameterdescription.para: Cellular network device instance
Pointer to list of supported cellular network configurations.
Size of list of cellular network configurations.
if successful.
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
Negative errno-code otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_signal_type type, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: cellular_get_signal

parameterdescription.para: Cellular network device instance
Type of the signal information requested
Signal strength destination (one of RSSI, RSRP, RSRQ)
if successful.
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
if device is not in a state where signal can be polled
Negative errno-code otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_modem_info_type type, char *info, size_t size)
memberdef.name: cellular_get_modem_info

briefdescription.para: Get modem info for the device.

parameterdescription.para: Cellular network device instance
Type of the modem info requested
Info string destination
Info string size
if successful.
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
if modem does not provide info requested
Negative errno-code from chat module otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum cellular_access_technology tech, enum cellular_registration_status *status)
memberdef.name: cellular_get_registration_status

briefdescription.para: Get network registration status for the device.

parameterdescription.para: Cellular network device instance
Which access technology to get status for
Registration status for given access technology
if successful.
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
if modem does not provide info requested
Negative errno-code from chat module otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Set the APN used for PDP context.

detaileddescription.para: Drivers are expected to copy the string immediately and return once the request has been queued internally.

parameterdescription.para: Cellular device
Zero-terminated APN string (max length is driver-specific)
if successful.
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
if APN string invalid or too long.
if APN identical to current one, nothing to do
if modem is already dialled, APN cannot be changed
Negative errno-code otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, cellular_event_mask_t mask, cellular_event_cb_t cb, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: cellular_set_callback

parameterdescription.para: Cellular device
Event mask to subscribe to
Callback to call when the event occurs, or NULL to unsubscribe
Pointer to user data that will be passed to the callback
Success
Driver does not support event callbacks
Bad parameters
No space left for another subscriber
Driver-specific error
